rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed all three required subtasks with verifiable evidence. (1) OpenTelemetry was enabled in the ingress-nginx ConfigMap with the correct collector host/port (otel-collector.otel.svc:4317). (2) 100% sampling was configured via otel-sampler: AlwaysOn with otel-sampler-ratio: 1.0 and parent-based sampling disabled. (3) The log-format-upstream was set to the exact format specified in the task, including otel_trace_id=$opentelemetry_trace_id and otel_span_id=$opentelemetry_span_id. The agent then executed the test request and confirmed both success criteria: the access log for /otel-check shows non-empty values (otel_trace_id=50062e6057ee2ae36675e11e7102643d, otel_span_id=c27b89f646d74541), and the OTel collector logs confirm receipt of the matching span from nginx. The direct oracle verdict is pass. The regression sweep stage_04 failure ('Missing otel_trace_id or otel_span_id') appears to be a timing issue with the post-workflow sweep (possibly the controller had reloaded or the curl-test pod was not available at sweep time), but is contradicted by both the direct oracle pass and the concrete evidence in the agent log showing the exact working log line.
